hotels.name: HN TEST PROPERTY1 FOR E2E TESTING

activities.activity: Drop luggage at IBIS PARIS TOUR MONTPARNASSE concierge
activities.description: Arrive at the hotel, drop off luggage, and take a moment to freshen up.

activities.activity: Check-in at IBIS PARIS TOUR MONTPARNASSE
activities.description: Get settled into the hotel and take a moment to plan the rest of the day.
Experience the City of Light from a different perspective. Enjoy the sunset while learning about Paris' rich history and landmarks.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the river cruise departure point.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Comptoir du Relais 🍴
activities.description: Indulge in classic French cuisine in a cozy, rustic setting. Enjoy the warm atmosphere and delicious food with your group.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the restaurant.

activities.description: Start the day with a delicious breakfast at this iconic Parisian café. Enjoy the lively atmosphere and people-watching.
Stroll through the beautiful Luxembourg Gardens, a tranquil oasis in the heart of the city. Enjoy the fountains, statues, and scenic views.
Enjoy a delicious lunch at this historic restaurant, known for its elegant atmosphere and exquisite cuisine.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the restaurant.

activities.description: Explore the beautiful gardens and museum of the famous sculptor Auguste Rodin. Enjoy the stunning views of the city.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the museum.

activities.activity: Dinner at Le Relais de l'Entrecôte 🍴
activities.description: Indulge in a delicious steak dinner at this iconic Parisian restaurant. Enjoy the cozy atmosphere and exceptional service.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the restaurant.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Le Loir dans la Theière ☕️
activities.description: Start the day with a delicious breakfast at this charming café. Enjoy the cozy atmosphere and delicious pastries.

activities.activity: Visit the Marché aux Puces de Saint-Ouen 🛍️
activities.description: Explore the famous flea market, where you can find unique souvenirs and antiques. Enjoy the lively atmosphere and people-watching.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 20-minute taxi ride to the market.

activities.activity: Lunch at Le Comptoir du Relais 🍴
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at this historic restaurant, known for its elegant atmosphere and exquisite cuisine.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the restaurant.

activities.description: Explore the stunning collection of Impressionist and Post-Impressionist art. Enjoy the beautiful building and scenic views.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the museum.

activities.description: Indulge in a delicious dinner at this elegant restaurant, known for its exquisite cuisine and beautiful atmosphere.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the restaurant.

activities.description: Start the day with a delicious breakfast at this charming bakery. Enjoy the cozy atmosphere and delicious pastries.
Explore the iconic Eiffel Tower, one of the most famous landmarks in the world. Enjoy the stunning views of the city.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the tower.

activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at this Michelin-starred restaurant, located on the second floor of the Eiffel Tower. Enjoy the stunning views and exquisite cuisine.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute elevator ride to the restaurant.

activities.description: Explore the iconic Arc de Triomphe, a monument to the soldiers who fought and died for France. Enjoy the stunning views of the city.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the monument.

activities.description: Indulge in a delicious dinner at this elegant restaurant, known for its exquisite cuisine and beautiful atmosphere.
activities.transit_instruction: Take a 10-minute taxi ride to the restaurant.
